s1_note: S1 OOM: natif produit 40MB stdout (48 voix polymétriques) → OOM kill. Ni MIDI ni texte ne finissent. S2 fonctionne (29 tokens).
s1_vs_s2_note: Pitch 100% identique (multiset sort). Timing diffs = arrondi MIDI ticks→ms.
s3_vs_s4_note: 29 tokens both sides. All names match. Timings ±26ms (brace spacing in transpiled polymetry). Question for Bernard.
s2_vs_s3_note: Enharmonic differences: reb5 vs do#5, sib1 vs la#1. Same pitches, different names.
